description_long: This object is a stylized flower with five broad, rounded petals arranged in a radial pattern. Each petal is slightly asymmetrical, with jagged or notched edges that give a naturalistic, organic appearance. The petals are a soft, muted pink color and are evenly spaced around a central point, forming a symmetrical star-like shape. There is no visible stem or leaves attached to the flower, and the structure appears flat and thin. The surface of the petals is smooth with a matte finish, lacking any visible texture or veins. The overall design is simple and elegant, reminiscent of a cherry blossom or sakura flower.
description: A flat, stylized pink flower with five notched petals arranged radially and no visible stem or leaves. The petals are smooth and evenly spaced, creating a symmetrical, star-like shape.
description_view_0: The flower is seen from above, showing all five petals clearly with their notched edges and central symmetry.
description_view_1: The flower is rotated, revealing the same five petals but with a slightly different perspective on the notches and petal overlap.
description_view_2: A top-down view highlights the radial symmetry and even spacing of the petals, with the notches visible on each petal.
description_view_3: The flower is viewed from another angle, emphasizing the irregular notches and the flatness of the petals.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, evenly spaced around a central point with no visible overlap or layering. The arrangement is symmetrical, typical of many ornamental flowers.
